title: Slap Battles
description: Minecraft mod of popular Roblox game: Slap Battles
body:
Slap battles is a mod based off of a popular roblox game called "Slap Battles"

This mod adds lots of cool gloves that give special effects

These gloves range in power and abilities

Most of these gloves have their recipe unlocked at the start, although others will require some advancements to get.

The more powerful gloves get very buggy, so be careful with them and dont delete the enderdragon(I know the consequences).

 

[Mcreator website](https://mcreator.net/modification/95495/slap-battles)

[Curseforge Website](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/slap-battles)

 


[Guides can be found on my YT channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfvi9olSqHj2YhLHj7NsG1Q)

[Join the discord for sneak peaks and more guides!](https://discord.com/invite/SCENPxEgv2)
 

ALL CREDITS FOR MUSIC GO TO 'DM Dokuro" AND 'Desolo Zantas'

 Boogie(icon that appears when getting the boogie advancement) art made by The_GravityBreaker

 

VERSIONS 6.1 AND ABOVE REQUIRE GECKOLIB

VERSION 10.0 AND ABOVE WILL NO LONGER SUPPORT 1.18.2

THIS MOD RUNS ON FORGE

THIS MOD WILL NOT BE PORTED TO FABRIC

Mod status and known bugs can be found on the Curseforge page
